title: G@bal #1380
definition:
Gebal = "mountain"

 1) a maritime town of Phoenicia near Tyre (modern 'Jebeil') known to
    the Greeks as 'Byblus'
nasbUsage:

 1) a maritime town of Phoenicia near Tyre (modern 'Jebeil') known to
    the Greeks as 'Byblus'
